notes: With-skill outputs achieved 100% pass rate across all assertions vs 37.5% without skill
The skill's biggest impact: flowing narrative (no section headers), vivid problem statements, and customer behavior-change quotes — all three consistently absent without the skill
Without-skill outputs default to a PR-agency template (FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE, bullet lists, FAQ sections) rather than Amazon's narrative style
Trade-off: with-skill runs take ~80% longer on average (88s vs 49s) and use ~6% more tokens, which is acceptable given the quality improvement
